title: Elemental Maces
description: Elemental Maces aims to expand the number of Maces in the game, but also by adding very diverse and interesting effects
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Elemental_Maces/BH_EM_Header.webp) We are very happy to announce our new mod Elemental Maces! In this first version, it adds four new elemental maces, which we are sure you will enjoy in your games. In addition, we have added support for **[Awesome 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-3d-mace)**, so if you add this mod, which we recommend, the maces will have a 3D look. This is a brief description of the four maces added in the first version, but we are sure that new maces will be added in the future! **Smouldering Mace.** Use the powers of fire to create a circle of flames around you, while protecting you from the flames! The damage of this mace will not be so high at first, but if you know how to use it, it can be a very powerful weapon. **Ender Mace.** Who said you were afraid of heights? Use this mace to keep all the enemies away from you, now, every time you hit them, they will fly away from you... **Withering Mace.** An extremely powerful weapon, which is capable of withering everything around it! It will create a cloud of persistent withering particles when used, leaving death in its wake, while you are immune to its power. **Resonating Mace.** It will use the power of the guardian to create a massive sonic blast when used, inflicting massive damage and blinding the enemies around it. Enjoy its effects! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Elemental_Maces/BH_EM_Summary.webp) Basically, Elemental Maces aims to expand the number of Maces in the game, but also by adding very diverse and interesting effects. We don't want these weapons to be extremely OP, we have tried to make them balanced, and at the same time, fun to use, this is a summary of what each mace does. ### Smouldering Mace ### When crafting the mace, use a Blaze Rod instead of a Breeze Rod. This mace does 2/3rds the damage, but protects you from fire when held and sets a circle around you ablaze (along with all your enemies!) when used, dealing damage over time. ### Ender Mace ### When crafting the mace, use a End Rod instead of a Breeze Rod. This mace does the same damage, but causes all the mobs you hit to fly up into the air and float with levitation for ~5 seconds, before plummeting to the ground and taking fall damage. ### Withering Mace ### You'll need a Withering Breeze Rod to make this mace, as it's super strong. Surround a Breeze Rod with Wither Roses and a Nether Star at the top in a crafting table to make the Withering Breeze Rod, then use it to make the mace. This super powerful mace does extra damage, and withers all the enemies you hit! It creates a cloud of lingering wither particles when used, leaving death in your wake. Obviously, with this deathly mace, you are immune to the wither effect yourself. ### Resonating Mace ### You'll need a Resonating Breeze Rod to make this mace. Surround a Breeze Rod with Echo Shards, with the Skulk Catalyst dropped by the Warden at the top in a crafting table. This mace has the power of the Warden, creating a massive sonic blast when used! It deals MASSIVE damage, and blinds all of the nearby enemies, along with flashy effects when you do a successful hit. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Elemental_Maces/BH_EM_FAQ.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Is it compatible with other Mace mods? ### We have tried to ensure maximum compatibility with other mods, and we guarantee that it is perfectly compatible with **[Awesome 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-3d-mace)**, which, in fact, we recommend its use for a better gaming experience. Likewise, if you detect any problems, let us know, and we will solve them immediately. ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Elemental_Maces/BH_EM_Screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/f2a952f5367caa5d04a405aa05e51b2f1a633961.png) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/e866b27bbb7eaee52c5ef3fa1a992eb7a03bb42c.png) ![Screenshots 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/3e9de324329b1ebc0587dab9aff3c761378f61b3.png) ![Screenshots 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/aa07880f10ffbe4f5ccfc4c03d0f245193dc849d.png) ![Screenshots 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/1df9c64857bf64bd5a1e06fdf34ae26014e66be3.png) ![Screenshots 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ZRT4oxpT/images/16a00dfd65bb8dcd4bd2fc73c0aec29803d5edc5.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
